name: cluster-B-pipeline-schema-mismatch

name: cluster-E-multi-requirement-cli
goal: Build a Python CLI tool fileinfo.py with the following requirements: (1) accepts a positional argument PATH (file or directory). Run pytest and confirm all tests pass.

Also write test_caesar.py covering: encrypt('abc', 1) == 'bcd'; encrypt('XYZ', 3) == 'ABC' (wrap-around); encrypt('Hi, World!', 13) round-trips; non-letter punctuation preserved; shift of 0 is identity. Run pytest from the workspace and confirm all tests pass.

name: cluster-E-multi-requirement-cli
goal: Build a Python CLI tool fileinfo.py with the following requirements: (1) accepts a positional argument PATH (file or directory). (2) When PATH is a file, prints a single JSON object to stdout with keys: path, size_bytes, mtime_iso, sha256, mime_type. (3) When PATH is a directory, prints a JSON list of one such object per file (recursively). (4) Supports a --include EXT flag (repeatable) restricting to files with the given extension. (5) Supports a --max-depth N flag limiting directory recursion depth (0 = current directory only, default = unlimited). (6) Supports a --format flag accepting 'json' or 'csv', defaulting to 'json'. (7) Exits with code 0 on success, code 2 on missing PATH, code 3 on permission errors. (8) Includes a --version flag printing exactly 'fileinfo 0.1.0' and exiting 0. Also write test_fileinfo.py with at least 8 pytest tests covering the version flag, file mode, directory mode, --include filter, --max-depth, --format csv, missing PATH, and at least one happy-path JSON shape check. Run pytest and confirm all tests pass.
